mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `screen_rental_order` ( order_no, equipment_id, shop_id, shop_name, business_circle_id, business_circle_name, total_amount, order_time, user_id, phone, nick_name, display_type, status, remark, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{data.orderNo}, #{data.equipmentId}, #{data.shopId}, #{data.shopName}, #{data.businessCircleId}, #{data.businessCircleName}, #{data.totalAmount}, #{data.orderTime}, #{data.userId}, #{data.phone}, #{data.nickName}, #{data.displayType}, #{data.status}, #{data.remark}, #{data.createTime}, #{data.updateTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT shop_id FROM `screen_rental_order` WHERE equipment_id = #{equipmentId} AND status = 2

SELECT o.id AS orderId, o.order_no AS orderNo, o.order_time AS orderTime, o.status AS status, o.equipment_id AS equipmentId, e.serial_number AS serialNumber, o.total_amount AS totalAmount, o.business_circle_id AS businessCircleId, o.business_circle_name AS businessCircleName, sm.address AS businessCircleAddress, o.shop_id AS shopId, o.shop_name AS shopName, o.nick_name AS nickName, o.phone AS phone, o.display_type AS displayType, d.rental_months AS rentalMonths, o.remark AS remark FROM `screen_rental_order` o LEFT JOIN `shop` s ON s.id = o.shop_id LEFT JOIN `equipment` e ON e.id = o.equipment_id LEFT JOIN `supermarket_info` sm ON sm.id = o.business_circle_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT order_id, GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(rental_year, '.', LPAD(rental_month, 2, '0')) ORDER BY rental_year, rental_month SEPARATOR '、') AS rental_months FROM `screen_rental_detail` GROUP BY order_id) d ON d.order_id = o.id WHERE o.id = #{orderId} AND s.merchant_id = #{adminId} LIMIT 1

SELECT o.id AS orderId, o.order_no AS orderNo, o.order_time AS orderTime, o.status AS status, o.equipment_id AS equipmentId, e.serial_number AS serialNumber, o.total_amount AS totalAmount, o.business_circle_id AS businessCircleId, o.business_circle_name AS businessCircleName, sm.address AS businessCircleAddress, o.shop_id AS shopId, o.shop_name AS shopName, COALESCE(m.merchant_name, o.shop_name) AS merchantName, o.nick_name AS nickName, o.phone AS phone, o.display_type AS displayType, d.rental_months AS rentalMonths, o.remark AS remark FROM `screen_rental_order` o LEFT JOIN `equipment` e ON e.id = o.equipment_id LEFT JOIN `shop` s ON s.id = o.shop_id LEFT JOIN `merchant` m ON m.id = s.merchant_id LEFT JOIN `supermarket_info` sm ON sm.id = o.business_circle_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT order_id, GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(rental_year, '.', LPAD(rental_month, 2, '0')) ORDER BY rental_year, rental_month SEPARATOR '、') AS rental_months FROM `screen_rental_detail` GROUP BY order_id) d ON d.order_id = o.id WHERE o.id = #{orderId} LIMIT 1
